raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1578 clarifies the license number disclosure requirements for insurance agents in California.",
    "California Insurance Code §1725.5 mandates that insurance agencies must include their license numbers on materials distributed to consumers.",
    "SB 1242 modernized California's existing statutes to encompass email and digital communications regarding license number requirements.",
    "AB 1578 specifies that individual licensees must include their own license numbers on emails sent individually.",
    "AB 1578 requires that agency license numbers be included on emails sent by the insurance agency.",
    "The clarification provided by AB 1578 aligns the requirements for email correspondence with those of printed documents.",
    "AB 1578 aims to eliminate confusion regarding the license number requirements for insurance agents.",
    "AB 1578 enhances consumer protection by ensuring that consumers can verify the licensing status of insurance agents and brokers."
  ]
}
```
